intended_use: SubtleHD is an image processing software that can be used for image enhancement of all body parts MRI images. It can be used for noise reduction and increasing image sharpness.
intended_use_full: SubtleHD is an image processing software that can be used for image enhancement of all body parts MRI images. It can be used for noise reduction and increasing image sharpness.
ground_truth: For paired test set: standard-of-care (SOC) clinical images and SubtleHD-enhanced SOC images as reference. For aligned test set: high-quality vendor-reconstructed images from same undersampled k-space data. For performance validation: radiologist-drawn regions of interest (ROI) and board-certified radiologist review. For reader study: independent board-certified radiologist assessments using Likert scale.
other_metrics: Denoising - SNR improvement of at least 40% in homogeneous regions for 90% of dataset (default mode) and 95% (high denoising mode). Sharpness - slope increase in line ROI for 90% of dataset (default) and 95% (high sharpening). L1 Loss reduction of -38.837% ± 15.469% (aligned test set, p<0.0001). SSIM improvement of 0.0367 ± 0.0219 (aligned test set, p<0.0001). PSNR improvement of 3.844 dB ± 2.172 dB (aligned test set, p<0.0001). Gradient entropy reduction indicating no over-smoothing in 90-95% of cases. Reader study showed statistically significant improvement (p<0.05) in SNR, overall image quality/diagnostic confidence, and small structure visibility.
